title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Animated Feature Oscar Race and Predictions
text: The Golden Globes announced six nominees for Best Animated Feature: Arco, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle, Elio, KPop Demon Hunters, Little Amélie or the Character of Rain, and Zootopia 2. According to Gold Derby's latest odds, KPop Demon Hunters leads the race at 99.2% likelihood of earning an Oscar nomination. The Netflix film is trailed closely by Zootopia 2, though the Disney sequel may face challenges given the Academy's historical resistance to sequels. Following these two are Arco (96.2%), Elio (86.9%), and Little Amélie or the Character of Rain (86.8%), with Demon Slayer at 11.6%. The article notes that all five Oscar nominees first appeared on the Globes list in 2025, and at least four of five overlapped in 2023, 2022, and 2021. Notably, every Oscar winner since 2007 has been nominated at the Globes, with the last five Globe winners—Soul, Encanto, Pinocchio, The Boy and the Heron, and Flow—all proceeding to win the Academy Award. The Critics Choice Awards matched five of six Globe nominees, with only In Your Dreams versus Demon Slayer showing divergence.
